calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Brendan Brewer, Esq. for Plaintiff Commercial Construction and Improvements.
Plaintiff's witness, David Whiteside was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Modular Steel Systems, Inc.
Damages of $148,589.69
Attorney's fees of $660.00
Costs of $339.50
Interest of $14,585.97
For the total of $164,448.16.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Continued To Jan-23-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
